calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-27-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-19-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A., as successor by merger to Washington Mutual Bank.
No appearance by defendants Beyong Events, a California corporation, or William J. Pierce, a/k/a William Pierce, an individual.
Defaults were entered against defendants on April 28, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on August 12, 2010.
Order waiving witness appearnce at default prove-up hearing was filed on August 4, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A., as successor by merger to Washington Mutual Bank, and against the Defaulted Defendants Beyond Events, a California corporation, and William J. Pierce, a/k/a William Pierce, an individual as follows:

Damages/Principal - $48,013.22.
Prejudgment Interest - $5,406.99.
Attorney's Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $543.95, for a total judgment in the amount of $56,789.16.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-10-2010 Continued To Aug-19-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-29-2010 Continued To Sep-10-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
